activityName: Battery cell EoL recycling, LFP, CFF
comment: Based on Delegated Act to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, methodology for the calculation and verification of the carbon footprint of electric vehicle batteries, with 50% Li recycling (hydrometallurgical), according to EU-2023/1542 2027 target
